description_long: This mosque features a large central dome with a ribbed pattern and a prominent finial at the top, surrounded by four smaller domed towers at each corner. The structure is primarily white with brown accents, including decorative bands and window frames, giving it a striking contrast. The main building is rectangular with two levels of arched windows and a series of entryways along the front. The four corner towers are cylindrical, each topped with a smaller dome and adorned with horizontal brown bands. The roof and domes are detailed with geometric cutouts, and the central dome is crowned with an Islamic crescent symbol. The mosque sits on a broad, tiled platform that extends around the perimeter, providing a sense of grandeur and stability.
description: A grand mosque with a large ribbed central dome, four smaller domed corner towers, and a white-and-brown color scheme, set on a broad tiled platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central dome, and all four corner towers with their domes clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view with the central dome and corner towers visible, but the main entrance is not seen; the rear wall is prominent.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the symmetry of the structure, with the central dome and two side towers in clear profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 2, showing the other two corner towers and the central dome.
attribute_dome: Five domes are visible: one large central ribbed dome with a crescent finial, and four smaller domes atop each corner tower. All domes are white with brown accents and have a rounded, hemispherical shape.
attribute_minaret: Four minaret-like corner towers, each cylindrical and topped with a small dome, rise slightly above the main roof but are shorter than the central dome. They feature horizontal brown bands and are positioned at each corner of the mosque.
attribute_islamic_geometric_patterns: Geometric cutouts and patterns are visible on the domes and around the windows, primarily in white and brown, resembling traditional Islamic star and tessellation motifs.
attribute_arabic_calligraphy: Arabic calligraphy is visible as a crescent-topped finial on the central dome, likely featuring the word 'Allah' or a similar religious inscription, but no other calligraphy is clearly visible.
attribute_architectural_style: The mosque exhibits a blend of Ottoman and modern Islamic architectural styles, characterized by the large central dome, corner minaret-like towers, arched windows, and geometric ornamentation.
